summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 4 features completed. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: updated studio info (Instagram, address), same-day scheduling, one-booking-per-day limit, reschedule within 30 min, and booking confirmation dialog with Da/Ne buttons.
passed_tests: GET /api/studio-info returns updated Instagram URL (https://www.instagram.com/lineapilatesreformer/) - PASSED
GET /api/studio-info returns updated Instagram handle (@lineapilatesreformer) - PASSED
GET /api/studio-info returns updated address (Kralja Petra I Oslobodioca 55, 89101 Trebinje) - PASSED
GET /api/schedule returns today's date slots (same-day scheduling) - PASSED
Schedule slots have all required fields (id, datum, vrijeme, instruktor, ukupno_mjesta, slobodna_mjesta) - PASSED
POST /api/auth/phone/send-otp sends OTP - PASSED
POST /api/auth/phone/verify with correct OTP creates session - PASSED
POST /api/bookings creates training successfully - PASSED
POST /api/bookings returns error if user already has booking for that date (one-per-day limit) - PASSED
POST /api/bookings/{training_id}/reschedule works within 30 min window - PASSED
POST /api/bookings/{training_id}/reschedule validates training existence (404 for non-existent) - PASSED
GET /api/trainings/upcoming returns user's upcoming trainings - PASSED
Home page shows @lineapilatesreformer Instagram handle - PASSED (UI)
Home page shows 'Kralja Petra I Oslobodioca 55, 89101 Trebinje' address - PASSED (UI)
Home page shows Google Maps iframe embed - PASSED (UI)
Schedule page allows selecting today's date (same-day scheduling) - PASSED (UI)
Schedule page shows today's future time slots (4 afternoon slots) - PASSED (UI)
Schedule page shows booking confirmation dialog with day/time details - PASSED (UI)
Booking confirmation dialog has Da/Ne buttons - PASSED (UI)
Schedule page shows 'existing booking' info bar when user has booking for selected day - PASSED (UI)
Reschedule button appears within 30 min of booking - PASSED (UI)
Reschedule dialog shows current booking details and 30 min message - PASSED (UI)
Reschedule mode shows banner with current booking info - PASSED (UI)
critical_code_review_comments: Same-day scheduling works - today's date is selectable and shows future time slots only
One booking per day limit enforced both in booking and reschedule endpoints
Reschedule 30 min window correctly validated using created_at timestamp
Booking confirmation dialog properly shows day/time details with Da/Ne buttons
Google Maps iframe uses address from studio-info API
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule slots (240 slots for 30 days)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 4 features tested and working. Phone OTP is MOCKED (always 123456). Schedule data comes from MongoDB. Same-day scheduling shows only future time slots for today. One booking per day limit enforced. Reschedule available within 30 min of booking creation. Booking confirmation dialog shows Da/Ne buttons.

mocked_apis.phone_otp: Always returns 123456 - SMS not actually sent
